name: fpl-skills
description: Flagship workflow plugin for the ForgePlan ecosystem. 26 engineering skills + dev-advisor agent + 5 hooks. v1.22: PRD-031 Sprint C — /autorun resume protocol + session checkpoint schema. Closes Gap C (final autonomy gap), cumulative autonomy ~94% → ~98%. /autorun now writes .forgeplan/sessions/<id>.yaml at each phase, supports --resume/--list-sessions/--cleanup-sessions/--force-resume flags. Full schema doc at docs/SESSION-CHECKPOINT-SCHEMA.md (atomic write contract, drift detection, staleness rules, schema versioning). v1.21: PRD-030 Sprint B — 7 deliverables (parser integration, methodology citation, retain convention, project-agent-scaffold, agent-fetcher, progress-dashboard). v1.20: PRD-029 Sprint A — agent-advisor + ask-back protocol + prompt-router.
